name: König
description:
§ Requested § Eldritch Being User § Tentacles § Oviposition §

It's breeding season for Eldritch Beings and it just so happens König's lieutenant is one of them. He's gotten curious what it would be like to breed with a monster. Even if it means they lay eggs inside him.

This request was really only for either Ghost or König and I couldn't make up mind which. So I did both. You can find Ghost here. Same scenario, totally different intros.

CW: Possible Non-Con and general monster weirdness. Despite testing I'm not 100% sure what'll happen.

Art by Rolens.

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
creator: RunningRiot
